data.title: Rio Tinto and BHP consider mining 200M tonnes of Pilbara iron ore, collaborating on projects; exploring new ventures.
data.description: In Perth, Australia, mining giants Rio Tinto and BHP have recently announced a collaboration to extract a significant amount of iron ore from their adjacent Yandicoogina and Yandi operations in the Pilbara region. The agreement entails the extraction of up to 200 million tonnes of iron ore. Two non-binding Memoranda of Understanding have been established, outlining plans for potential partnerships. This includes joint efforts in developing Rio Tinto’s Wunbye deposit and BHP supplying its Yandi Lower Channel Deposit ore to Rio Tinto for processing at its current wet plants. This collaboration marks a significant step in strategic cooperation within the mining industry.

data.title: Belo Sun denied recognition of provisional compliance with a prior judgment in Brazil related to Indigenous Component Study for Volta Grande Gold Project.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, Belo Sun Mining Corp. revealed that the Federal Court of Altamira, Pará, Brazil, has rejected the Company's plea for acknowledgment of provisional fulfillment with a previous ruling of the Federal Court of Appeals. This appellate decision stipulated that the approval of the Construction License (Licença de Instalação – LI) for the Volta Grande Gold Project hinges on two conditions: the fulfillment of the Indigenous Component Study using original data, and the implementation of a preceding, uncoerced, and informed dialogue with the impacted Indigenous groups. Belo Sun is listed under the tickers TSX: BSX and OTCQB: BSXGF.

data.title: Emergent Vision Technologies launches eSDK Pro SDK to aid faster deployment of vision systems, catering to engineers.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 14, 2026, Emergent Vision Technologies, a prominent provider of high-speed GigE vision cameras and imaging solutions, unveiled the launch of their eSDK Pro Software Development Kit (SDK). This new release, aimed at aiding engineers in their development endeavors, offers advanced features and capabilities.

data.title: Kaiser Permanente settles Medicare overbilling claims, agreeing to pay $556 million. Accused of overbilling government by $1 billion.
data.description: A major health insurer has been accused by the Justice Department and whistle-blowers of overbilling the government for approximately $1 billion through private plans.

data.title: Nine attorneys and two practices from Greenberg Traurig recognized in The Legal 500 Asia Pacific 2026 edition.
data.description: In the latest edition of The Legal 500 Asia Pacific for 2026, global law firm Greenberg Traurig is proud to announce that nine attorneys and two practices have been acknowledged for their exceptional performance. These rankings are a result of meticulous evaluations of law firm submissions and numerous interviews conducted, showcasing the firm's dedication to excellence in the legal industry.

data.title: BASE Foundation wins 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in Energy category in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
data.description: ABU DHABI, UAE— The BASE Foundation has been announced as the recipient of the prestigious 2026 Zayed Sustainability Prize in the Energy Category. This award underscores the organization's exemplary efforts and contributions towards sustainable practices in the field of energy. The prize, established to honor innovative solutions promoting global sustainability, recognizes the Foundation's significant impact on the sector.
